label: District ID
description: Unique identifier for the district (Kabupaten/Kota).
how_created: Assigned as <PROVINCE-ABBREV>_D<nn>; Aceh districts carry real names in district_name.

label: District name
description: Name of the district. Real names for Aceh's 23 districts; systematic placeholders elsewhere.
how_created: Real Aceh district names hand-coded from Maps 2-3; other provinces use 'Province District k'.
notes: Per user choice: real Aceh names + IDs elsewhere.

label: Province
description: Indonesian province the district belongs to.
how_created: Hand-coded; 10 Sumatra provinces (Aceh, North Sumatra, and 8 'rest of Sumatra').

label: Region group
description: Coarse grouping used to build estimation samples.
how_created: Derived from province: Aceh, North Sumatra, or Rest of Sumatra.
notes: North Sumatra enters only in robustness (Table 5).

label: District type
description: Kota (urban city district) vs Kabupaten (rural regency).
how_created: Hand-coded to reproduce Table 7 city/rural sample sizes (Aceh: 5 Kota, 18 Kabupaten).
notes: 2 of the 10 flooded Aceh districts are Kota.

label: Coastal dummy
description: 1 if the district lies on the coast, 0 if inland.
how_created: Hand-coded; all 10 treated districts are coastal. Used to drop inland controls (Table 6).
notes: Coastal control counts approximate the paper's robustness sample.

label: Flooded / treated dummy
description: Treatment indicator: 1 if the district was flooded by the 2004 tsunami.
how_created: Hand-coded from the inundation maps (10 Aceh + 2 North Sumatra island districts).

label: Neighbour-of-flooded dummy
description: 1 if a non-flooded district borders a flooded one (placebo-treated in Table 9).
how_created: Hand-coded adjacency for the placebo test; flooded districts are dropped in that test.
notes: Used only for the placebo difference-in-differences.

label: Treatment-group label
description: Readable label combining treatment status and region.
how_created: Derived from flooded + region_group.

label: Latitude
description: District-centroid latitude (decimal degrees, +N).
how_created: Real approximate centroids for Aceh's 23 districts; drawn within the real province bounding box for synthetic non-Aceh districts.
notes: Enables Conley spatial standard errors (≤100 km). Time-invariant.

label: Longitude
description: District-centroid longitude (decimal degrees, +E).
how_created: See latitude. Used with latitude for haversine distances.

label: Year
description: Calendar year of the observation.
how_created: Panel spans 1999-2012 (levels).

label: Post-tsunami dummy
description: 1 for years 2005 and later.
how_created: 1 if year >= 2005.

label: DiD period
description: Event-time period used for the staggered DiD dummies.
how_created: Mapped from year: baseline 2000-02, pre 2003-04, tsunami 2005, recovery 2006-08, postrec 2009-12.

label: Real GDP
description: District real GDP excluding oil & gas, constant 2004 USD, millions.
how_created: Cumulated from the 1999 base level using the simulated gdp_growth series.
notes: Absolute scale chosen for realistic per-capita values.

label: GDP growth rate
description: Annual growth rate of real GDP (log difference).
how_created: district_FE + year_FE + treated increment (city/rural, Table 7 col2) + Aceh-control spill-over + spatial & serial shocks + N(0,0.04) noise.
notes: Main dependent variable; NaN in 1999 and for Subulussalam 2003-2006.

label: Population
description: District population (persons).
how_created: Cumulated from the 1999 base using pop_growth (flooded districts lose ~9.6% in 2005).

label: Population growth
description: Annual population growth rate.
how_created: district_FE + year_FE + flooded x population increment (death shock 2005) + noise.

label: GDP per capita
description: Real GDP per capita, constant 2004 USD.
how_created: gdp_const_usd_m * 1e6 / population.

label: GDP per-capita growth
description: Annual growth rate of real GDP per capita.
how_created: gdp_growth - pop_growth (so it reproduces Table 8 by construction).
notes: No significant 2005 loss; significant 2006-08 gain. NaN where growth missing.

label: Agriculture VA share
description: Agriculture value added as % of GDP.
how_created: Province trajectory + district/type offset; Aceh falls 44->32% after 2004.
notes: Aggregate to province for the structural-change synthetic control.

label: Manufacturing VA share
description: Manufacturing value added as % of GDP.
how_created: Province trajectory + noise; Aceh falls ~6->3.5% after 2004.

label: Services VA share
description: Services / tertiary value added as % of GDP.
how_created: Province trajectory + offset; Aceh rises ~40->55% after 2004.

label: Capital formation per capita
description: Gross capital formation per capita, current USD.
how_created: Smooth path + reconstruction spike (peak 2006) for Aceh; smooth for donors.

label: Poverty rate
description: Share of population below the poverty line.
how_created: District base + downward trend; Aceh improves after 2005.

label: Doctors per 1,000
description: Physicians per 1,000 people.
how_created: District base + upward trend; Aceh rises faster after 2005.

label: Water access
description: % of households with clean-water access.
how_created: District base + upward trend; Aceh boosted after 2005.

label: Sanitation access
description: % of households with sanitation access.
how_created: District base + upward trend; Aceh boosted after 2005.

label: Electricity access
description: % of households with electricity.
how_created: Aceh 84% (2004) -> 97% (2012); others smooth upward trend.

label: Human Development Index
description: Human Development Index (0-100 scale).
how_created: Aceh ~69 -> ~73; others smooth upward trend.
